revenue_recognition.policy: Revenues recognized when control of product or service transfers to customer. Key revenue streams: gross fees (base management, incentive management, franchise/other fees), owned and leased revenues, distribution revenues, other revenues, and revenues for reimbursed costs.
revenue_recognition.franchise_fees: Initial franchise fees combined with ongoing royalty fees as single performance obligation; deferred and recognized over expected customer life (typically initial term of FA). Ongoing royalty fees recognized as sales-based royalties over time as services rendered.
revenue_recognition.system_wide_services: Accounted for under fund model. Assessment fee billed monthly. Revenues in reimbursed costs; expenses in reimbursed costs. Franchisor is principal (has discretion over spending). Managed to break-even over time but timing differences may affect net income.
revenue_recognition.loyalty_program: Points earned represent material right. Revenue deferred until redemption. Breakage estimate uses third-party actuaries. Franchisor is agent for managed/franchised hotels (net recognition), principal for owned/leased hotels (gross recognition).

useful_lives.leasehold_improvements: Shorter of lease term or useful life

impairment_policy.methodology: Quarterly assessment. Undiscounted future cash flow test first; if carrying value exceeds undiscounted CF, fair value determined via discounted CF, appraisals, or broker valuations.
impairment_policy.goodwill_impairment_2024: 110 million (management and franchising reporting unit) + $15 million (hotel disposition-related)

income_taxes.note: Deferred income taxes of $(123)M in 2024 operating cash flow adjustments. Effective rate varies significantly due to gains/losses on real estate and impairments.

advertising_fund_accounting.model: Fund model — system-wide services revenues and expenses recognized separately in reimbursed costs. Franchisor has discretion over spending (principal). Managed to break-even over time.
advertising_fund_accounting.note: Advertising costs generally reimbursed by owners/franchisees. Distribution segment advertising not reimbursable ($67M/year).

material_notes.subsequent_events: Not specifically identified in pages read. Form 8-K filed March 26, 2025 included as Exhibit A-2.

related_party_transactions.description: Hyatt Hotels Corporation guarantees franchisor obligations. Hyatt Corporation provides System Services. Rosemont provides optional purchasing. Key money payments to customers ($144.8M franchise agreement assets on LLC balance sheet). Co-branded credit card arrangements with JPMorgan Chase.

variable_interest_entities.description: Consolidated financial statements include entities consolidated under VIE model. Specific VIE details not extracted from notes pages read.

key_money_assets.description: Payments to customers (key money) recorded as assets and amortized to contra revenue over expected customer life (typically initial FA term). Franchise agreement assets on LLC balance sheet: $144.8M.

loyalty_program_liability.description: Deferred revenue from loyalty program classified as current and long-term contract liabilities. Critical audit matter per Deloitte — breakage estimate involves significant judgment.
loyalty_program_liability.note: Contract liabilities include loyalty program and other deferred revenue. Not all contract liabilities relate to loyalty program.

real_estate_dispositions.strategy: Asset-light transformation — selling owned hotels, retaining management/franchise agreements. Multiple hotel dispositions described in notes.
